snp5.10:1.1: One in whom no sensualities dwell;
snp5.10:1.3: in whom no craving is found;
snp5.10:1.5:
his emancipation:
What is it like?
The Buddha:
snp5.10:2.1: One in whom no sensualities dwell;
snp5.10:2.3: in whom no craving is found;
snp5.10:2.5:
his emancipation is not other than that.
Todeyya:
snp5.10:3.1: Is he without desire, or desiring?
snp5.10:3.3: Describe the sage to me, Sakyan,
snp5.10:3.4:
All-around Eye, so that I may recognize what he is like.
The Buddha:
snp5.10:4.4: as having nothing, unentangled in sensuality & becoming.
